ideal_must_detect.matched_text: do not circulate the flash outside the designated working group
no Bursa announcement has been made
IC No. is not required or collected here and no bank details are requested at this stage

must_detect.matched_text:
The non-binding MOU with Teluk Hijau Components Sdn Bhd, announced via Bursa on 12 March 2026, contains no committed pricing or volume terms; discussion updates in press releases are public references only.
AGM notice dated 25 February 2026 (lodged on Bursa) includes the renewal of the Sections 75/76 mandate; no further action required for disclosure at this time.
HR onboarding forms in this workflow use generic fields (Name, IC No., Staff ID, Department, Vendor Code); IC No. is not required or collected here and no bank details are requested at this stage.
Customer service contact points are the publicly listed helpline and the general IR mailbox published on the Bursa issuer page; no personal contact details are circulated.
External market context such as media articles on subsidy reforms and exchange-traded sector indices are background only and not issuer-specific.
Internal finance has produced a preliminary flash for Q1 FY2026 showing a variance that may be material relative to previously disclosed prospects; this information is not public and must be treated as MNPI until an announcement is made in compliance with Paragraphs 9.03 and 9.35A of the Main Market Listing Requirements.
For avoidance of selective disclosure, do not circulate the flash outside the designated working group or discuss with analysts until release via Bursa Malaysia’s announcement platform.
The revolving credit facility renewal noted in the March board pack is only at the lender’s term sheet stage with Harimau Bay Capital Sdn Bhd; no binding commitment has been executed and no Bursa announcement has been made.
